ping.title: Pong
session.unapproved: This server isn't approved to use this bot yet. Ask the bot owner {{if .Owner}}<@{{.Owner}}> {{end}}to approve it.
session.denied: You don't have permission to use /{{.Command}} on this server. Ask a server admin to grant your role access to it.
permissions.panel.header:
**Permissions** — page {{.Page}}/{{.Pages}}
Pick the roles allowed to use each command. Changes apply immediately.
permissions.command.contracts.use: Reserve, deliver & release on contract posts
permissions.panel.placeholder: Roles allowed to use this command
permissions.panel.empty: No commands to manage on this server.
settings.panel.header:
**Server settings**
Theme: **{{.Theme}}** · Language: **{{.Language}}**
Pick a value below; changes apply immediately.
settings.section.forum.label: **Contracts forum** — where new contracts are posted.
bases.error.no_member: Specify which member's base with the `member` option.
bases.error.bad_base: Pick a base from the suggestions.
bases.error.bad_equipment: Pick an item from the suggestions.
bases.error.base_not_found: That base wasn't found, or it isn't yours to manage.
bases.error.equipment_not_found: That item wasn't found on the base.
bases.register.limit: Base limit reached ({{.Limit}}). Unregister one first.
bases.extractor.limit: This base already has the maximum of {{.Limit}} extractors.
bases.production.limit: This base already has the maximum of {{.Limit}} production facilities.
bases.list.title: 🛰️ Bases
bases.list.empty: No bases match your filters yet.
bases.list.expired: This listing expired — run `/base list` again.
contracts.error.not_in_thread: Run this inside a contract thread.
contracts.error.item_not_found: That item isn't on this contract.
contracts.create.failed_forum: Couldn't create the contract — the forum channel is missing. An admin should re-run `/contract forum`.
contracts.create.failed_perms: Couldn't create the contract thread — the bot lacks permission on the forum channel.
contracts.item.exists: That item is already on the contract.
contracts.reserve.over_cap: That's more than the contract still needs for this item.
contracts.deliver.over_reserved: You can't deliver more than you reserved.
contracts.release.below_delivered: You can't release what's already delivered.
contracts.embed.title: 📜 {{.Title}}
contracts.panel.none_reserve: Nothing left to reserve on this contract.
contracts.panel.none_deliver: You have nothing reserved to deliver here.
contracts.panel.none_release: You have nothing reserved to release here.
contracts.panel.expired: This picker expired — tap the button again.
contracts.notify.closing_soon: 📢 {{.Mentions}} — this contract closes in {{.Left}}. Deliver what you've reserved before it expires.
contracts.notify.closing_soon_done: 📢 This contract closes in {{.Left}} — every reservation has been delivered.
contracts.console.home_unpublished_hint: ⚠️ Unpublished contracts haven't reached the forum yet — usually a Discord access error. Open one and tap 🔄 Republish to retry.
contracts.console.template_wip: 🚧 WIP — templated contracts are coming soon.
contracts.console.over_reserved: That's more than this member still has to deliver.
contracts.console.over_cap: That's more than the item can still hold.
contracts.console.qty_below_reserved: The new required quantity is below what members have already reserved.
contracts.console.republish_creating: Posting the contract — it'll appear in the forum shortly.
contracts.console.bad_deadline: Enter the deadline as whole numbers of days, hours, and minutes (leave all blank for no deadline).
contracts.console.bad_item: Give an item name and a positive quantity.
contracts.console.no_forum: No contracts forum is set. An admin must set it in `/settings` first.
contracts.console.max_items: This contract already has the maximum of {{.Limit}} items.
contracts.console.denied: You don't have permission for this action.
contracts.console.template_locked: Template contracts can't change items — only the deadline and cancelling.
contracts.console.item_not_found: That item isn't on this contract.
contracts.console.item_exists: An item with that name is already on the contract.
contracts.console.below_delivered: You can't release what's already delivered.
